question: How do I log in as an employee?
answer: Go to Employee Login, enter your company email and password. If you were invited by your manager, use the temporary password from your invite email, then complete your profile at the profile completion page.

question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
answer: On the Employee Login page, use Forgot password (if enabled) or contact your manager/HR to resend an invite. OTP verification may be required for new registrations.

question: Why am I asked to complete my profile after first login?
answer: Manager bulk invites create a minimal account. You must set a permanent password and fill required profile fields (designation, department, etc.) before accessing TalentX and InterviewX.

question: What is TalentX and how do I start?
answer: TalentX is your role development workspace. After login, open the Employee hub and choose TalentX. Pick a target role, review skill gaps, follow the guided prep plan, and take skill assessments.

question: How do I choose a target role?
answer: Use Target Role or browse roles by industry/education. Select a role aligned with your career path. Your manager can also recommend a role — you'll see a notification in the navbar bell.

question: How is my preparation progress calculated?
answer: Progress reflects completed skills and assessment scores across your active role plan. Managers see average progress and latest test results on their dashboard.

question: How do I take a skill test?
answer: Open your role page, select a skill, and start the test. Submit answers when done. Results show pass/fail and score percentage. You can retake based on your organization's policy.

question: My skill test failed. What should I do?
answer: Review the skill prep materials on your role timeline, practice weak areas, and retake the test. Ask your manager for a role recommendation or additional resources if you're stuck.

question: How do I access InterviewX interview preparation?
answer: From the Employee hub, click InterviewX. You'll open interview prep in a new tab with your SSO details (email and name) pre-filled.

question: Can I practice mock interviews from TalentX?
answer: Yes. After completing relevant skills, use mock interview links on your role page. They deep-link to InterviewX with your completed skills context.

question: What is a role recommendation notification?
answer: When your manager or HR recommends a role for you, a bell notification appears in the navbar. Accept or dismiss it to update your preparation focus.

question: The page shows a blank screen or 500 error
answer: Try a hard refresh (Ctrl+F5). Clear browser cache. If using Docker, ensure frontend and backend containers are healthy. Contact support with your browser, URL, and screenshot.

question: How do I access the manager monitoring dashboard?
answer: Log in via Manager/HR Login. After authentication you'll land on the monitoring dashboard showing team KPIs, employee prep status, and activity feed.

question: Which employees can I see on my dashboard?
answer: Managers see employees in the same industry and department, plus direct reports. HR sees all departments company-wide.

question: How do I filter employees on the dashboard?
answer: Use the toolbar: search by name/email, filter by prep status (active/not started), sort by progress or recent test. HR can also filter by industry, department, and staff role.

question: How do I invite employees in bulk?
answer: On the manager dashboard, use Invite employees from Excel. Download the template, fill Email and Name columns, upload the file. New accounts are created in your department and report to you.

question: What columns are required in the invite Excel template?
answer: Required: Email and Name. HR uploads must also include Department. Each invitee receives email with temporary password and must complete profile on first login.

question: How do I recommend a role to an employee?
answer: In the employee table, click Recommend role on the employee row. You'll browse roles scoped to the employee's department and send a recommendation they see in their portal.

question: How do I view analytics for an employee's role prep?
answer: Click a role name under Track in the employee table. Analytics open in a new tab showing skill progress, tests, and timeline for that employee and role.

question: How do I schedule or view interviews?
answer: Use Schedule interview / Open schedule hub on the dashboard, or AI Interviews under manager navigation. Interview scheduling is handled in InterviewX; TalentX provides monitoring and handoff links.

question: Manager vs Employee login — which should I use?
answer: Use Manager/HR Login for monitoring dashboards and invites. Employees use Employee Login for TalentX prep and InterviewX practice.

question: What can HR see that managers cannot?
answer: HR view shows all departments and industries. HR can filter by department, invite across departments (with Department column in Excel), and access company-wide analytics.

question: How does department comparison work for HR?
answer: The dashboard shows average preparation progress per department, helping HR compare engagement and identify departments that need support.

question: HR bulk invite requirements
answer: HR Excel uploads require Email, Name, and Department for each row. Accounts are created under the correct department. Row errors are reported after upload.

question: How are departments and roles organized?
answer: Organization structure is seeded from company configuration. Departments map to role templates in TalentX. Contact your admin to add departments or update role catalogs.

question: What does the engagement strip show?
answer: Active in last 7/30 days, dormant employees (no activity in 30 days), and team size — useful for workforce readiness reporting.

question: What is the Admin role in TalentX?
answer: Admins manage organization settings, employee accounts at scale, and platform configuration. Admin profile is at /profile/admin/. Some admin routes redirect to the manager dashboard.

question: How do I manage all employees as admin?
answer: Use admin employee APIs and dashboards. Admins can list employees, view summaries, and configure org-wide settings. Access requires ADMIN account type.

question: How is the role blueprint catalog loaded?
answer: On Docker startup, seed-ensure loads Excel workbooks into MongoDB if the catalog is empty. Manual re-seed: docker compose --profile seed run --rm seed.

question: How do I run TalentX with Docker?
answer: From Blueprint folder: docker compose up --build -d. Web: localhost:3002, API: localhost:9081, MongoDB: localhost:27018. Rebuild frontend after route changes: docker compose build --no-cache frontend.

question: Backend API returns 401 Unauthorized
answer: JWT may be expired — log out and log in again. Ensure Authorization Bearer header is sent. Check backend health at /api/blueprint/all/.

question: Is there a subscription for TalentX?
answer: TalentX workforce access is typically provided by your employer. Billing questions should go to your HR or company admin, not individual employees.

question: Excel upload failed during bulk invite
answer: Ensure file is .xlsx or .xls, first sheet has correct headers, emails are unique and valid, and HR uploads include Department. Check error list shown after upload for row-level issues.

question: Employee not appearing on dashboard
answer: Verify they completed profile, belong to a visible department, and have logged in at least once. Refresh the dashboard. Check filters aren't hiding them.

question: How does Help and Support work?
answer: Users access /help-and-support/ for FAQs, AI chat, live agent chat, email support, create ticket, and track ticket. Admins handle live chats at /admin/.

question: How do I access Help and Support?
answer: From the Saarthi Workforce navbar, open Help & Support. You can browse Employee FAQs, search articles, use the AI assistant, start live chat, email support, request a call, or create and track tickets.

question: How does the AI assistant work?
answer: Tap Ask AI assistant on the Help page. Choose a topic chip or type your question. The assistant uses your Employee FAQs and can suggest connecting to a live agent if your issue is not resolved.

question: How do I create or track a support ticket?
answer: On Help & Support, choose Create Ticket and fill in your issue details. Use Track ticket to view status updates. Keep your ticket ID for follow-up.

question: How do I connect with a live support agent?
answer: Use Live chat on the Help page or ask the AI assistant to connect you to a live agent. When an agent accepts, you can continue the conversation in the same chat window.

question: How do I access Help and Support as a manager?
answer: Open Help & Support from the Workforce navbar. Manager-specific FAQs cover dashboards, bulk invites, role recommendations, and analytics. You can also use AI chat, live agents, email, and tickets.

question: How do I create or track a support ticket?
answer: From Help & Support, select Create Ticket and describe your issue (e.g. invite upload errors, dashboard filters). Use Track ticket to check responses from the support team.

question: How do I connect with a live support agent?
answer: Choose Live chat on the Help page or request a live agent in the AI chat after describing your issue. An agent can help with invite failures, employee visibility, and dashboard questions.

question: How do I access Help and Support as HR?
answer: Open Help & Support from the navbar. HR FAQs cover company-wide views, cross-department invites, engagement metrics, and org structure. Use AI chat, live agents, email, calls, and tickets as needed.

question: How do I create or track a support ticket?
answer: Use Create Ticket on the Help page for workforce-wide issues such as missing departments, bulk invite errors, or reporting needs. Track ticket shows status and replies.

question: How do I connect with a live support agent?
answer: Start Live chat or ask the AI assistant to connect you to an agent. HR queries often involve cross-department data — include department names and screenshots when possible.

question: How do I handle live agent chats as admin?
answer: Sign in to the Help & Support admin area to view waiting live chats, accept requests, and respond to users. Ensure your admin account is configured with agent access.

question: How do I manage support tickets as admin?
answer: Use the admin Help & Support dashboard to view, assign, and resolve tickets submitted by employees, managers, and HR. Filter by user type, channel, and status.

question: How do I connect with platform support?
answer: Admins can use the same Help channels — AI chat, live agent, email (Saarthiworkforce@gmail.com), or Create Ticket — for Docker, API, seeding, and org configuration issues.
